pet_notes: Compact whole-body pet version of the reference character: dark amber-brown body, sweeping hair, glowing yellow X eyes and chest glow, stitched doll-like eerie charm, clawed hands, long limbs simplified for 192x208 cells; preserve recognizable Cyn identity, no text, no background.
style_notes: stylized 3D-toy / painterly mascot sprite, crisp silhouette, readable at small size
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `auto`: Infer the most appropriate pet-safe style from the user request and reference images, then keep that exact style consistent across every row. User style notes: stylized 3D-toy / painterly mascot sprite, crisp silhouette, readable at small size.
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
